label: uHOME-server Quickstart
summary: Starter orientation pack for learning the preview, approval, and local runtime dispatch flow through uHOME-server.

inputs.name: server_operator_name
inputs.description: Name of the operator learning the uHOME-server flow.

inputs.name: server_goal
inputs.description: The first uHOME-server workflow goal they want to try.

outputs.name: quickstart_preview
outputs.description: Small orientation preview for the first uHOME-server run path.

outputs.name: quickstart_sync_package
outputs.description: HubSpot-scoped sync package used to exercise the uHOME-server review and dispatch seam.
